name: Tomato Butter Dill Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 plum tomatoes, seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter until golden brown.
2. Sauté the tomatoes just to warm them up.
3. Add the dill off the heat.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
To assemble a hot meal:
- Place a bed of rice on a plate.
- Top with salmon steak.
- Spoon any steaming juices over the salmon.
- Garnish with warm tomato sauce.
